requirement: Corporate actions, FRC reporting, bot tenant-scoping per Strategy Directive §4.1-4.2

tasks.title: Corporate actions module + FRC reporting
tasks.description:
Add corporate actions and FRC reporting to the securities-service.

Read docs/securities-architecture.md section 8 (CSD Integration — Corporate Actions) for types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go for existing types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go for store patterns.
Read src/securities-service/internal/server/server.go for route registration.

Part A — Corporate Actions types + store:
Add to types.go:
- CorporateActionType constants: CA_DIVIDEND, CA_STOCK_SPLIT, CA_RIGHTS_ISSUE, CA_MERGER, CA_TENDER_OFFER, CA_SPIN_OFF
- CorporateAction struct: ID, InstrumentID, ActionType, AnnouncementDate, ExDate, RecordDate, PaymentDate, Details map[string]interface{} (for dividend amount, split ratio, etc.), Status (ANNOUNCED/PROCESSING/COMPLETED/CANCELLED), TenantID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags
- Entitlement struct: ID, CorporateActionID, ParticipantID, InstrumentID, Quantity int, EntitlementValue float64, Status (PENDING/PAID/CANCELLED), CreatedAt — json tags
- FRCReport struct: ID, TenantID, ReportType (DAILY_SUMMARY/LARGE_TRADER/SUSPICIOUS_ACTIVITY), ReportDate, Data map[string]interface{}, GeneratedAt — json tags

Add to store.go:
- CorporateActionStore interface: Create, Get, List(instrumentID, actionType optional), UpdateStatus
- EntitlementStore interface: Create, ListByAction(actionID), ListByParticipant(participantID)
- InMemoryCorporateActionStore + InMemoryEntitlementStore

Part B — Corporate Actions handlers:
Create src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_corporate_actions.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions — list with filters (instrument_id, action_type, status)
- POST /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions — announce (admin): create with status ANNOUNCED
- GET /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions/{id} — get by ID
- POST /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions/{id}/process — process entitlements: for DIVIDEND, look up all positions for the instrument, create entitlements with quantity * dividend_amount. For STOCK_SPLIT, adjust position quantities by split ratio.
- Wire routes in server.go

Part C — FRC Reporting:
Create src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_reports.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/reports/frc?type=DAILY_SUMMARY&date=2026-04-23 — generate FRC report
- DAILY_SUMMARY: count of trades, total volume, total value for the date
- LARGE_TRADER: positions exceeding a threshold (>1000 shares or configurable)
- SUSPICIOUS_ACTIVITY: trades with unusual patterns (placeholder — return empty list for MVP)
- Reports are generated on-demand from in-memory data, not stored
- Wire routes in server.go

Part D — Update main.go to create corporate action + entitlement stores, pass to server.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Bot tenant-scoping for all MCP tools
tasks.description:
Add tenant_id parameter to all MCP tools in admin-bot so commands are tenant-scoped.

Read src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/securities.ts for current securities tools (9 tools).
Read src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/platform.ts for current platform tools (6 tools).
Read src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/gateway-client.ts for how requests are made.

Update securities.ts — add tenant_id parameter to all 9 tools:
- Each tool gets: tenant_id: z.string().optional().describe('Tenant ID (default: ace-commodities)')
- In the request, add X-GarudaX-Tenant header: client.request(method, path, body, { 'X-GarudaX-Tenant': tenant_id ?? 'ace-commodities' })
- Check if GatewayClient.request supports custom headers — if not, update gateway-client.ts to accept optional headers parameter
- Update response formatting to show tenant_id in output

Also add 3 new corporate actions tools:
- list_corporate_actions — GET /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions with tenant_id header
- announce_corporate_action — POST /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions
- generate_frc_report — GET /api/v1/securities/reports/frc?type=DAILY_SUMMARY

Platform tools (platform.ts) do NOT need tenant_id — they are platform-level.

Run: cd src/admin-bot/mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for corporate actions + FRC + verify
tasks.description:
Write tests and verify everything.

Part A — Corporate actions tests at src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_corporate_actions_test.go:
- TestAnnounce_Success — POST dividend → 201
- TestAnnounce_MissingFields → 422
- TestListCorporateActions — list with filters
- TestGetCorporateAction_NotFound → 404
- TestProcessDividend — create instrument + positions + dividend, process → entitlements created
- TestProcessStockSplit — positions adjusted by ratio

Part B — FRC reporting tests at src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_reports_test.go:
- TestFRCDailySummary — create trades, generate report → trade count/volume/value correct
- TestFRCLargeTrader — create large positions, generate report → positions above threshold
- TestFRCMissingType → 422

Part C — Store tests (add to store_test.go):
- TestCorporateActionStore_CRUD
- TestEntitlementStore_CreateAndList

Part D — Full verification:
- export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover
- cd src/admin-bot/mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit
- cd src/admin-ui && npm test -- --run

Target: 70%+ on handlers_corporate_actions, handlers_reports.

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
